description: Local-first, auditable memory for MCP-compatible AI agents with explicit writes and SQLite storage.
name: io.github.fabionfsc/nuzo-memory

environmentVariables.description: Optional absolute path to the local SQLite memory store.
environmentVariables.name: NUZO_MEMORY_STORE

environmentVariables.description: Optional default Nuzo memory scope, such as user:default or project:auto.
environmentVariables.name: NUZO_MEMORY_SCOPE

environmentVariables.description: Optional comma-separated allowlist of memory scopes available to this MCP process.
environmentVariables.name: NUZO_AUTHORIZED_SCOPES

environmentVariables.description: Optional project root used to resolve project:auto scope.
environmentVariables.name: NUZO_PROJECT_ROOT

title: Nuzo Memory
